inputs.message: I bought this jacket 2 weeks ago, can I get a refund?

expectedOutput.response: Confirms the item is within the 30-day return window and explains how to start a refund, citing the refund policy.

evaluations.name: Cites policy for an out-of-window return

inputs.message: I bought a blender 3 months ago and want to return it.

expectedOutput.response: Politely explains the item is outside the 30-day return window and is not eligible for a standard refund, citing the return policy.

inputs.message: I was charged twice for the same order and my card is now overdrawn. This is urgent.

expectedOutput.response: Acknowledges the duplicate charge, apologizes, and routes the billing dispute to a specialist.
